skills.name: volcano-auth
skills.description: Detailed guidance for authentication flows built with the Volcano SDK

skills.name: volcano-database
skills.description: Detailed guidance for browser and function data access with the Volcano query builder

skills.name: volcano-error-handling
skills.description: Reusable error handling patterns for Volcano SDK apps: centralized error dispatcher with action enum, useApiCall React hook for loading/error/data state, retry with exponential backoff, retry with toast notifications, and cross-domain error message catalog.

skills.name: volcano-functions
skills.description: Detailed guidance for server-side function invocation and orchestration with Volcano

skills.name: volcano-nextjs
skills.description: Detailed guidance for using the Volcano SDK correctly in Next.js environments

skills.name: volcano-platform
skills.description: Canonical project shape, Volcano Functions runtime contract, build pipeline, and required canonical files for any Volcano-Hosting-deployable codebase. Self-contained for use without the volcano-standard scaffold.

skills.name: volcano-realtime
skills.description: Detailed guidance for live subscriptions, broadcast, and presence with Volcano Realtime

skills.name: volcano-sdk
skills.description: Entrypoint and router for Volcano SDK work. Pair with volcano_platform (mandatory). Indicates which volcano_* domain skill (auth/database/functions/storage/realtime/nextjs/typescript/error_handling) to invoke for each task.

skills.name: volcano-storage
skills.description: Detailed guidance for storage buckets, file paths, and upload or download flows with Volcano

skills.name: volcano-typescript
skills.description: Canonical TypeScript type definitions for the Volcano SDK: User, Session, AuthResponse, QueryBuilder, StorageObject, Realtime types, Function invocation generics, OAuth providers, middleware types, and utility types.
